summary: Adjusted the opening so the chapter enters through Noor's bodily state and the bad cafeteria coffee instead of repeating another workstation-message opening. The ending already carried the required knife-delivery and Haruki-aftermath handoff cleanly, so it was left intact.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph around Noor's coffee and sleeplessness while preserving the 10:17 AM dossier arrival and all downstream beats.
